Notes: * Marajiah Bacon breaks single-game school scoring record with her second
triple-double of the season (46 points, 11 steals, 10 rebounds). Previous
mark 43 points by Monique Hemingway vs. Rutgers-Camden on Feb. 11, 1989.
Game.Location: Jersey City, NJ (John J. Moore AFC)
Game.Officials: Marcelyn  Williams, Kaz  Beverley, Ted Sochaski
